Advisory.Description:
## Duplicate Advisory

This advisory has been withdrawn because it is a duplicate of GHSA-766v-q9x3-g744. This link is maintained to preserve external references.

## Original Description
PraisonAI before 1.5.115 contains a path traversal vulnerability in MultiAgentMonitor that fails to sanitize agent IDs when building file paths. Attackers can include traversal sequences like ../ in agent IDs to read, write, or overwrite arbitrary files, enabling sensitive disclosure, denial of service, or code execution.
Advisory.Summary: Duplicate Advisory: PraisonAI has Memory State Leakage and Path Traversal in MultiAgent Context Handling
